heading: Printing Acts, joint resolutions, and treaties
label: 711 Printing Acts, joint resolutions, and treaties
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office, on receiving from the Archivist of the United States a copy of an Act or joint resolution, or from the Secretary of State, a copy of a treaty, shall print an accurate copy and transmit it in duplicate to the Archivist of the United States or to the Secretary of State, as the case may be, for revision. On the return of one of the revised duplicates, he shall make the marked corrections and print the number specified by .section 709 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 192 (R.S. § 3805; , ; 1950 Reorg. Plan No. 20, § 1, eff. , 15 F.R. 3178, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 5628 Stat. 60964 Stat. 1272May 24, 1950

Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–2351984— substituted “Archivist of the United States” for “Administrator of General Services” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 98–497
